# QP

Constrained optimization that minimizes a quadratic objective under linear equality and inequality constraints.

<div class="algorithm-meta">
  <span>Optimization</span>
  <span>quadratic programming, convex optimization, constrained control</span>
  <span>Mermaid</span>
</div>

## Flowchart

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[Define quadratic cost] --> B[Set decision variables]
    B --> C[Add equality and inequality constraints]
    C --> D[Solve constrained quadratic program]
    D --> E{Feasible and converged?}
    E -- No --> F[Adjust model or constraints]
    F --> C
    E -- Yes --> G[Extract optimal control or trajectory]
```


## Notes

- A positive semidefinite Hessian yields a convex problem.
- QP is commonly used for trajectory smoothing, allocation, and MPC subproblems.
